summary: The session manager divergence is rustfmt-only noise in graceful-disconnect, pending session, and authentication returns; no session lifecycle behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 168: M	crates/net/network/src/session/mod.rs.
The isolated patch adds semicolons to early returns and one queued-action push expression.
No graceful disconnection capacity handling, connection event emission, pending outbound session failure handling, authentication failure handling, or session channel setup changed.
